task_description: Build a full-stack photo tagging application with ML-powered analysis. The app uses face detection (DeepFace), object detection (YOLOv8), and scene classification to automatically tag photos into categories: Who (people), Faces (attributes), What (objects/activities), Where (scene/location). Features a React/Next.js frontend with responsive photo grid, multi-category filter panel with OR/AND logic, sortable by multiple criteria, and groupable by date/location/person. Python FastAPI backend with async API, SQLite database, and pluggable ML analysis pipeline.

verification.summary: Backend: 27/27 tests pass (API, integration, model tests). Frontend: pnpm build succeeds with 0 errors. Tests cover real code paths including upload, analysis pipeline, filtering, sorting, pagination, and deletion. Integration tests verify the full flow end-to-end.
